title: Math Forest Match
description: Embark on an exciting mathematical journey deep into the heart of the enchanted forest! In Math Forest Match, explore the lush greenery while sharpening your arithmetic skills. Connect magical objects by solving math equations in this fun and educational adventure. With charming woodland creatures as your guides, immerse yourself in a world of numbers and nature. Are you ready to unlock the secrets of the forest through the power of math?
instructions: Tap and drag to connect the operations
